title: Quy Nhon, Binh Dinh — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Quy Nhon, Binh Dinh: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Quy Nhon is a city in Binh Dinh with a population of 450,000. An emerging coastal destination with beautiful beaches, a developing tourism scene, and one of the lowest costs of living among Vietnam’s provincial capitals.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
